mapper.insert: INSERT INTO following (id, from_user_id, to_user_id, rel_status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, 1, #{now}, #{now})
INSERT INTO follower (id, to_user_id, from_user_id, rel_status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{toUserId}, #{fromUserId}, 1, #{now}, #{now})
mapper.update: UPDATE following SET rel_status = 0, updated_at = #{now} WHERE from_user_id = #{fromUserId} AND to_user_id = #{toUserId}
UPDATE follower SET rel_status = 0, updated_at = #{now} WHERE to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND from_user_id = #{fromUserId}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM following WHERE from_user_id = #{fromUserId} AND to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND rel_status = 1)
SELECT * FROM following WHERE from_user_id = #{fromUserId} AND to_user_id = #{toUserId}
SELECT to_user_id FROM following WHERE from_user_id = #{userId} AND rel_status = 1 AND created_at < (SELECT created_at FROM following WHERE id = #{after}) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT from_user_id FROM follower WHERE to_user_id = #{userId} AND rel_status = 1 AND created_at < (SELECT created_at FROM follower WHERE id = #{after}) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM following WHERE from_user_id = #{userId} AND rel_status = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM follower WHERE to_user_id = #{userId} AND rel_status = 1
